title: ED12 — Experimental GWAVE sound #12
tldr: Second of three 'ED' experimental GWAVE presets. See **ED10** for the broader context — these are developer test sounds left in the released ROM.
how: GWAVE preset with its own unique configuration in `SVTAB`. Engine code identical to HBDV; firing it explores a particular point in the GWAVE parameter space.
watch: Standard GWAVE indicators — see how ED12 differs from ED10 / ED17 in the engine view.
